plan.annotation: Likelihood and impact on consistent 1–5 scales; upper-right zone marks the priority region. Source: Q2 risk register.

operations.label: Labeled likelihood and impact axes
operations.value: Horizontal likelihood axis 1–5; vertical impact axis 1–5, consistent scales

operations.label: Three editable risk markers
operations.value: Pipeline coverage (4,5); implementation capacity (3,4); retention concentration (2,5)

operations.label: Priority zone
operations.value: Upper-right high-likelihood/high-impact region shaded to flag priority risks

plan.pptxFallback: PowerPoint fallback uses editable native shapes: labeled axis lines with 1–5 tick labels, a shaded priority-zone rectangle, and three movable marker shapes with direct text labels; no bar chart or linear stack is substituted.
plan.takeaway: Pipeline coverage is highest priority; implementation capacity is 3 by 4 and retention concentration is 2 by 5.
plan.title: Q2 Operating Risk Priorities
